summary: Created a new '/lib' workflow building blocks library file (.agent/workflows/lib.md) to centralize shared steps and definitions previously scattered across other workflows. Moved into '/lib': Canonical Document Format, Resolve Input, Research (with Quick/Standard/Deep levels), Tracing, Persona Definitions (10 personas), Perspective Composition, Classification, QA Verification, Risk Analysis, and Context Reordering. Other workflows were updated to reference '/lib' sections instead of duplicating logic or referencing '/plan' for document format. This establishes '/lib' as the single source of truth for shared building blocks.
